text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
We're here at Hanshin Racecourse! Who do you
think will come out on top today?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking Ikuno Dictus! Win it this time, Ikuno!
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I think it'll be Mejiro Palmer. She was fantastic in
last year's Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling Nishino Flower. This might not be her
best distance, but she definitely has the potential
to win it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: No way! Today's all about Mejiro McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
There are certainly a lot of people here today
rooting for Mejiro McQueen! And how about
you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The person on the other side of the microphone is
none other than...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: I'm rooting for Matikanetannhauser, of course!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She's always optimistic and inspiring! Even
today... I came here just to watch her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can truly feel how rapidly you've improved since
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've marked you as the person I have to be most
careful of today, and I'll be doing my absolute
best to beat you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, let's have a good race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yes, I'll do my best too! I'm looking forward
to a great race today!
